summary: FULL REGRESSION TEST — All 12 tests PASSED (100%). Verified: auth, contacts, campaigns (create/delete/duplicate), tag→auto-enrollment with immediate task creation, card event tracking with dynamic resolver, performance dashboard (customer_card_views), card API returning card_type, and tasks endpoint with contact_name.
critical_code_review_comments: tracking.py: Dynamic card type resolution working correctly — resolve_card_action() handles ANY card type (welcome, thankyou, etc.) without hardcoding
tasks.py: Performance endpoint correctly uses regex pattern '__REGEX__:^(?!digital_|store_).*_card_(viewed|download)' to match customer card events dynamically
campaigns.py: Campaign creation, duplication working correctly — duplicate creates '(Copy)' suffix with active=false
contacts.py: _check_tag_campaign_enrollment correctly triggers immediate task creation when step 1 has delay_hours=0
congrats_cards.py: get_congrats_card returns card_type field as expected
seed_data_creation: Test campaigns and enrollments created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Full regression test passed. Key architecture: (1) tracking.py resolve_card_action() dynamically handles ANY card type — no hardcoding needed for new card types. (2) tasks.py customer_card_views uses regex to match *_card_viewed/*_card_download excluding digital_ and store_ prefixes. (3) Tag→campaign enrollment immediately creates task+pending_send+notification when step 1 has delay=0, and advances enrollment to step 2. (4) Campaign duplication creates copy with '(Copy)' suffix and active=false.

backend_api.GET /api/campaigns/{user_id}: PASS - Returns campaigns with name, type, sequences, active
backend_api.POST /api/campaigns/{user_id}: PASS - Creates campaign with sequences and trigger_tag
backend_api.POST /api/campaigns/{user_id}/{campaign_: PASS - Creates copy with '(Copy)' suffix, active=false
backend_api.PATCH /api/contacts/{user_id}/{contact_i: PASS - Triggers campaign enrollment when tag matches trigger_tag
backend_api.GET /api/campaigns/{user_id}/{campaign_i: PASS - Returns enrollments with current_step=2 (step 1 processed)
backend_api.GET /api/campaigns/{user_id}/pending-sen: PASS - Returns pending sends for step 1
backend_api.GET /api/tasks/{user_id}/performance/det: PASS - No store_card or digital_card events

mocked_apis.Twilio SMS: MOCKED - SMS sending is mocked, only task/pending_send creation verified
